channel.title: GitHub Makefile Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of Makefile in GitHub

item.title: JustEnoughLinuxOS/distribution
item.description: Home of the JELOS Linux distribution.

item.title: frida/frida
item.description: Clone this repo to build Frida

item.title: foostan/crkbd
item.description: Corne keyboard, a split keyboard with 3x6 column staggered keys and 3 thumb keys.

item.title: openwrt/packages
item.description: Community maintained packages for OpenWrt. Documentation for submitting pull requests is in CONTRIBUTING.md

item.title: open-telemetry/opentelemetry-proto
item.description: OpenTelemetry protocol (OTLP) specification and Protobuf definitions

item.title: aristanetworks/ci-workshops-avd
item.description: AVD workshop repository to deliver workshop content specific to AVD.

item.title: prometheus/client_model
item.description: Data model artifacts for Prometheus.

item.title: chaseSpace/k8s-tutorial-cn
item.description: The most(might be) detailed Kubernetes tutorials in Chinese. 全网最（可能）详细的Kubernetes中文教程。

item.title: eu-digital-identity-wallet/eudi-doc-architecture-and-reference-framework
item.description: The European Digital Identity Wallet

item.title: awesome-selfhosted/awesome-selfhosted-data
item.description: machine-readable data for https://awesome-selfhosted.net

item.title: temporalio/api
item.description: Temporal gRPC API and proto files

item.title: zh-google-styleguide/zh-google-styleguide
item.description: Google 开源项目风格指南 (中文版)

item.title: nestlabs/nlunit-test
item.description: Nest Labs Unit Test (nlunit-test) is a simple, portable unit test suite framework, capable of running on just about any system, no matter how constrained and depends only on the C Standard Library.

item.title: SiftScience/sift-ios
item.description: Sift iOS SDK

item.title: container-storage-interface/spec
item.description: Container Storage Interface (CSI) Specification.

item.title: lorien/awesome-web-scraping
item.description: List of libraries, tools and APIs for web scraping and data processing.

item.title: bouffalolab/bl_iot_sdk_tiny
item.description: IoT SDK only for Matter (no toolchain, Matter-specific, non-universal SDK)

item.title: gogo/googleapis
item.description: googleapis generated with gogoprotobuf

item.title: lightstep/lightstep-tracer-common
item.description: Files shared by most or all of the Lightstep tracer implementations

item.title: Clever/go-process-metrics
item.description: A library for tracking golang process metrics

item.title: buildroot/buildroot
item.description: Buildroot, making embedded Linux easy. Note that this is not the official repository, but only a mirror. The official Git repository is at http://git.buildroot.net/buildroot/. Do not open issues or file pull requests here.

item.title: richfelker/musl-cross-make
item.description: Simple makefile-based build for musl cross compiler

item.title: linuxacademy/content-source-control-git
item.description: Kenny's Source Control with Git Public Repo

item.title: open-telemetry/opentelemetry-specification
item.description: Specifications for OpenTelemetry

item.title: ChargePoint/buildroot
item.description: ChargePoint internal mirror of buildroot. Upstream: git://git.busybox.net/buildroot
